relations.description: Aniline physisorbs on SiO2 with dE = -0.57 eV
Higher reaction barriers on SiO2 compared to metal surfaces
Endothermic chemisorption (dE = 0.41 to 1.23 eV) leads to physisorption

inhibitor blocks growth surface by chemisorption
inhibitor is removed during purge due to weak physisorption
inhibitor blocks precursor nucleation on non-growth surface
